_description: Guest testimonials displayed on the StayWave Maldives website. To add a testimonial, append a new object with a unique id. rating is out of 5. date is an ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD). To feature a testimonial prominently, set featured to true.

testimonials.author: Michael Johnson
testimonials.text: The tiger shark diving experience was absolutely incredible. Our guides were knowledgeable, professional, and made us feel completely safe. Highly recommend!

en.text: The tiger shark diving experience was absolutely incredible. Our guides were knowledgeable, professional, and made us feel completely safe. Highly recommend!

testimonials.author: Sophie Laurent
testimonials.text: Best diving trip of my life! The accommodations were luxurious, the diving was world-class, and the WhatsApp support was incredibly responsive. Worth every penny!

en.text: Best diving trip of my life! The accommodations were luxurious, the diving was world-class, and the WhatsApp support was incredibly responsive. Worth every penny!

testimonials.author: James Chen
testimonials.text: Fuvahmulah is a diver's paradise, and StayWave showed us why. Professional, friendly, and they truly understand the local ecosystem. Can't wait to return!

en.text: Fuvahmulah is a diver's paradise, and StayWave showed us why. Professional, friendly, and they truly understand the local ecosystem. Can't wait to return!
